<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get an external payroll"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_uuid}/external_payrolls/{external_payroll_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get an external payroll for a given company.

scope: `external_payrolls:read`
